message:
perf: replace per-PID pgrep calls with single ps-based process tree

getTmuxSessionPIDs was spawning pgrep -P for every tmux pane PID
recursively, resulting in O(N) external process calls where N is
the total descendant count. Replace with a single ps -eo pid,ppid
call that builds the full child map in memory, then walks it.

internal/util tests: 5.5s → 1.1s (gt-pp2t)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
